Glutathione NACET Complex

Glutathione NACET Complex provides a carefully selected combination of amino acids and nutrients in a focused formulation.

The formula includes NACET (N-acetylcysteine ethyl ester), a modified form of cysteine, together with glycine—both amino acids that are naturally involved in protein metabolism.

A structured combination

Clean and focused

product.description:
Full Description

Modern life places constant demands on both body and mind—balancing work, responsibilities, and personal well-being can often lead to stress, fatigue, and disrupted sleep. However, many supplements only address one aspect of wellness, rather than supporting the body as a whole.

This is where HIFAS-Equilibrium stands out.

HIFAS-Equilibrium is a carefully formulated blend of three of the most researched functional mushrooms—Reishi, Lion’s Mane, and Cordyceps—combined with natural acerola vitamin C. This powerful trio works in synergy to support balance, resilience, and overall well-being, helping you adapt to daily stress while maintaining energy and mental clarity.

Designed as a comprehensive adaptogenic formula, HIFAS-Equilibrium supports both physical and emotional balance—so you can feel more centred, focused, and restored every day.



Restore Balance Naturally with HIFAS-Equilibrium

-Adaptogenic blend of Reishi, Lion’s Mane & Cordyceps
-Supports balance, resilience & overall well-being
-Helps maintain mental clarity and focus
-Supports energy and daily vitality
-With vitamin C to support normal immune system function
-Vegan, clean & allergen-free formula
-Made in Europe under strict quality standards


Why HIFAS-Equilibrium is a Game-Changer


Synergistic Mushroom Complex

This formula combines Reishi (adaptogen), Lion’s Mane (nootropic), and Cordyceps (energy support)—creating a well-rounded approach to daily balance and vitality.

Adaptogenic Support for Modern Lifestyles

Adaptogens help the body adapt to physical and mental stress, supporting resilience and overall equilibrium without overstimulation.

Enhanced with Acerola Vitamin C

Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system and helps reduce tiredness and fatigue, supporting everyday wellness.


Unique Features of HIFAS-Equilibrium

-Combination of three premium mushroom extracts with complementary benefits
-Contains naturally occurring beta-glucans and bioactive compounds
-Standardised extracts for consistent potency and quality
-Clean formulation with no allergens, GMOs, or unnecessary additives
-Vegan capsules suitable for daily use
-European biotech quality with full traceability and strict controls


Benefits of HIFAS-Equilibrium

-Supports overall balance and well-being
-Helps the body adapt to everyday stress
-Contributes to reduced fatigue and tiredness
-Supports focus and mental clarity
-Supports immune system function
-Promotes daily vitality and resilience


The Science Behind HIFAS-Equilibrium

The combination of Reishi, Lion’s Mane, and Cordyceps provides a broad spectrum of bioactive compounds, including beta-glucans, cordycepin, and other naturally occurring molecules studied for their role in supporting stress response, energy metabolism, and cognitive function.

By combining these three mushrooms in a single formula, HIFAS-Equilibrium delivers a synergistic effect, helping to support both body and mind in maintaining balance throughout the day.


Find your daily balance with HIFAS-Equilibrium—a modern adaptogenic formula designed to support your well-being, naturally.

product.title: Hifas-Microbiota refill | Hifas da Terra
product.description:
Full Description

Digestive comfort plays a key role in overall well-being. Modern lifestyles, stress, and diet can all impact the balance of your gut microbiota—often leading to discomfort such as bloating, irregular digestion, or fatigue.

This is where HIFAS-Microbiota stands out.

HIFAS-Microbiota is an advanced formula combining Lion’s Mane, Reishi, Oyster (Pleurotus), and Shiitake—a carefully selected blend of functional mushrooms rich in naturally occurring bioactive compounds. Designed to support gut balance and digestive comfort, this formula provides a natural source of prebiotic compounds to complement a healthy lifestyle.

With a combination of standardised extracts and mushroom powders, HIFAS-Microbiota delivers a broad spectrum of nutrients to support your body from within.



Support Your Gut Naturally with HIFAS-Microbiota

-Blend of Lion’s Mane, Reishi, Oyster & Shiitake mushrooms
-Provides naturally occurring prebiotic compounds
-Supports digestive comfort and gut balance
-Rich in beta-glucans and bioactive compounds
-Supports overall well-being and vitality

Why HIFAS-Microbiota is a Game-Changer

Multi-Mushroom Gut Support

This formula combines four well-known functional mushrooms, offering a diverse profile of bioactive compounds to support digestive balance.

Naturally Occurring Prebiotic Compounds

Beta-glucans and other polysaccharides found in mushrooms are associated with prebiotic effects, helping to support a balanced gut microbiota.

Full-Spectrum Formula

By combining extracts and powders, HIFAS-Microbiota provides both concentrated actives and whole-mushroom nutrients for a more complete approach.


Unique Features of HIFAS-Microbiota

-Standardised extracts for consistent potency and quality

-Includes bioactive compounds such as triterpenoids, hericenones, and ergosterol
-Combination of extract and powder for full-spectrum support
-Clean formulation with no unnecessary additives
-Vegan capsules suitable for daily use
-European biotech quality with full traceability and strict controls


Benefits of HIFAS-Microbiota

-Supports digestive comfort and gut balance
-Helps maintain overall well-being
-Supports natural energy and vitality
-Contributes to a balanced microbiota environment
-Complements a healthy diet and lifestyle


The Science Behind HIFAS-Microbiota

Functional mushrooms such as Reishi, Lion’s Mane, Pleurotus, and Shiitake are rich in naturally occurring compounds including beta-glucans, triterpenoids, hericenones, and ergosterol. These compounds have been widely studied for their role in supporting gut environment and overall physiological balance.

The inclusion of both extracts and powders ensures a broad and balanced composition, helping to deliver consistent and effective support for digestive well-being.


Support your gut from within with HIFAS-Microbiota—a comprehensive, mushroom-based formula designed for everyday digestive balance.

product.description:
Full Description

Supporting your immune system, stress balance, and cardiovascular health has never been more important. However, not all mushroom supplements are created equal—many products use low-quality raw materials or non-standardized extracts, resulting in limited potency and poor absorption.

This is where Mico Rei stands out.

Mico Rei is a premium, highly concentrated organic Reishi (Ganoderma lucidum) extract, traditionally known as the “mushroom of immortality.” Used for centuries in traditional practices and now supported by modern research, Reishi is valued for its powerful antioxidant and adaptogenic properties that help the body adapt to stress and maintain overall balance.

Say Hello to Daily Vitality with Mico Rei

-High-Potency Reishi Extract from the fruiting body only
-Rich in Polysaccharides & Beta-Glucans for immune support
-Enhanced with Natural Acerola Vitamin C for better absorption
-Supports Immunity, Circulation & Stress Balance
-Vegan, Clean & Allergen-Free Formula
-Made in Europe under strict quality standards


Why Mico Rei is a Game-Changer

Premium Fruiting Body Extract

Unlike many supplements that use mycelium, Mico Rei is made exclusively from the fruiting body, ensuring a higher concentration of active compounds like beta-glucans and polysaccharides.

Advanced Extraction for Maximum Potency

A sustainable, state-of-the-art extraction process guarantees optimal bioavailability, so your body can absorb and utilize the beneficial compounds more effectively.

Enhanced with Acerola Vitamin C

Natural acerola provides vitamin C, contributing to normal immune system function and supporting the absorption of key bioactives.


Unique Features of Mico Rei

-Standardized Reishi Extract rich in polysaccharides and bioactive compounds
-Adaptogenic Support to help the body manage stress and maintain balance
-Clean Formulation free from allergens, additives, and unnecessary fillers
-Vegan Capsules designed for convenience and easy daily use
-European Quality Manufacturing ensuring safety, consistency, and purity


Benefits of Mico Rei

-Supports a healthy immune system
-Helps maintain normal circulation and cardiovascular health
-Promotes resilience to physical and mental stress
-Provides powerful antioxidant protection
-Contributes to overall well-being and vitality


The Science Behind Mico Rei


Reishi mushroom has been widely studied for its beta-glucans, triterpenes, and polysaccharides, which are known to support immune modulation and antioxidant activity. Using only the fruiting body and a standardized extraction ensures consistent levels of these key compounds—delivering reliable results in every capsule.

The addition of natural vitamin C from acerola further enhances immune support while improving the body’s ability to absorb and utilize these beneficial nutrients.


Incorporate Mico Rei into your daily routine and experience the timeless benefits of Reishi—delivered through modern science for powerful, everyday support.

product.title: Mico-Cord 60 refill | Hifas da Terra
product.description:
Full Description

Maintaining energy, stamina, and overall vitality can be challenging—especially with modern lifestyles that demand constant physical and mental performance. However, not all energy supplements deliver real results. Many rely on stimulants or low-quality ingredients that provide only short-term effects.

This is where Mico Cord stands out.

Mico Cord is a premium, highly concentrated Cordyceps (Cordyceps sinensis) extract, traditionally known as the “energy mushroom.” Used for centuries in Asian practices and increasingly supported by modern research, Cordyceps is valued for its role in supporting energy metabolism, endurance, and overall vitality.

Formulated with both a standardized extract and micronised powder, Mico Cord delivers a full spectrum of bioactive compounds—including beta-glucans, cordycepin, and adenosine—combined with natural acerola vitamin C to support immune function and absorption.


Boost Your Energy Naturally with Mico Cord

-Highly concentrated Cordyceps extract with dual extract + powder formula
-Rich in beta-glucans, cordycepin & bioactive compounds
-Natural source of vitamin C from acerola for immune support
-Supports energy, stamina & physical performance
-Helps maintain vitality and resilience
-Vegan, clean & allergen-free formula
-Made in Europe under strict quality standards


Why Mico Cord is a Game-Changer

Dual-Action Formula for Maximum Effect

Mico Cord combines a standardised 6:1 extract with micronised Cordyceps powder, ensuring both high potency and a complete profile of active compounds.

Natural Energy Support (No Stimulants)

Cordyceps is naturally rich in adenosine, a precursor to ATP (cellular energy), helping support sustained energy production without the crash associated with stimulants.

Enhanced with Acerola Vitamin C

Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system and helps reduce fatigue, supporting overall vitality.


Unique Features of Mico Cord

-Standardised Cordyceps extract from selected Cs-4 strain
-High levels of polysaccharides and bioactive molecules
-Advanced, sustainable extraction process for optimal bioavailability
-Clean formulation free from allergens, GMOs, and unnecessary additives
-Vegan capsules suitable for daily use
-European biotech quality with full traceability


Benefits of Mico Cord

-Supports natural energy production and vitality
-Helps improve physical performance and endurance
-Contributes to reduced fatigue and tiredness
-Supports immune system function
-Promotes overall well-being and resilience


The Science Behind Mico Cord

Cordyceps has been widely studied for its unique compounds, including beta-(1-3)/(1-6)-D-glucans, cordycepin, and adenosine, which are linked to energy metabolism and immune support. Adenosine plays a key role in ATP production, the body’s primary energy currency.

Mico Cord uses a high-quality Cs-4 strain and a carefully controlled extraction process to ensure consistent levels of these bioactive compounds. This guarantees a reliable, potent supplement designed to support daily performance and long-term vitality.


Upgrade your daily routine with Mico Cord and experience natural, sustained energy—powered by one of nature’s most respected functional mushrooms.

product.title: Hifas-Intima gel | Hifas da Terra
product.description:
Intimate discomfort such as dryness, irritation, or sensitivity can affect daily well-being and confidence. Hormonal changes, stress, antibiotics, or lifestyle factors can disrupt the natural balance of the intimate area—impacting hydration, microbiota balance, and overall comfort.

This is where Hifas-INTIMA GEL stands out.

Hifas-INTIMA GEL is a fast-absorbing intimate moisturiser and lubricant designed to support hydration, comfort, and balance of the intimate area. Formulated with Lion’s Mane extract (Herizumib®), prebiotics, and soothing botanical ingredients, this advanced gel helps maintain the integrity of the mucosal barrier while supporting the natural microbiome.

Its carefully selected ingredients work in synergy to provide hydrating, soothing, and antioxidant support, making it ideal for daily use or during periods of increased sensitivity such as menopause, postpartum, or after antibiotic use.

Developed under dermatological and gynaecological control, Hifas-INTIMA GEL offers a gentle yet effective solution for maintaining intimate comfort and care.



Support Intimate Comfort & Hydration

-Intimate moisturiser and lubricant for daily use
-Helps maintain hydration and comfort of the intimate area

-Supports the balance of the intimate microbiome

-Compatible with condoms

-Made in Europe under strict quality standards


Why Hifas-INTIMA GEL is Different

Prebiotic Microbiome Support

Formulated with Bioecolia® (alpha-glucan oligosaccharide), this gel helps support the natural balance of the intimate microbiome and maintain the protective barrier of the skin.

Advanced Hydration & Repair

With ingredients such as hyaluronic acid, aloe vera, and Centella asiatica, the formula helps hydrate, soothe, and support the natural regeneration of the intimate mucosa.

Functional Mushroom Innovation

The inclusion of Lion’s Mane extract (Herizumib®) provides antioxidant and skin-supporting properties, contributing to overall intimate care.

product.title: Hifas-Menopause refill | Hifas da Terra
product.description:
Menopause and perimenopause bring natural hormonal changes that can impact both physical and emotional well-being. From shifts in mood and energy to changes in sleep and vitality, this stage of life often requires additional support to maintain balance.

This is where Hifas-Menopause stands out.

Hifas-Menopause is a comprehensive, hormone-free formula combining Reishi, Lion’s Mane, Cordyceps, Ashwagandha KSM-66, and Green Tea extract, enriched with probiotics, vitamins, and minerals. Carefully designed to support women during hormonal transitions, this advanced blend helps maintain balance, vitality, and overall well-being—naturally.

By combining adaptogenic mushrooms, plant extracts, and essential nutrients, Hifas-Menopause provides targeted support for both body and mind throughout this stage of life.


Support Your Balance Naturally with Hifas-Menopause

-Adaptogenic blend of Reishi, Lion’s Mane & Cordyceps
-With Ashwagandha KSM-66 and Green Tea extract (95% polyphenols)
-Formulated with probiotics, vitamins & minerals
-Designed to support overall well-being during menopause
-With vitamin B6 to contribute to the regulation of hormonal activity
-Vitamin B6 contributes to normal psychological function and reduction of tiredness and fatigue
-With vitamin D and zinc to support the maintenance of normal bones
-With vitamin A to support the maintenance of normal mucous membranes
-Vegan, clean & allergen-free formula
-Made in Europe under strict quality standards


Why Hifas-Menopause is a Game-Changer

Hormone-Free Support

Formulated without hormones or isoflavones, this product offers a natural alternative for women seeking balance during menopause.

Multi-Ingredient Synergy

Combining adaptogenic mushrooms, botanicals, probiotics, and essential micronutrients, Hifas-Menopause provides a comprehensive approach to well-being.

Adaptogenic & Nutritional Support

Adaptogens such as Reishi, Cordyceps, and Ashwagandha are traditionally used to support resilience, while key vitamins and minerals contribute to normal physiological functions.


Unique Features of Hifas-Menopause

-Combination of mushroom extracts, botanicals, and probiotics
-Standardised extracts for consistent potency and quality
-Contains naturally occurring bioactive compounds including beta-glucans and polyphenols
-Includes clinically studied Ashwagandha KSM-66
-Enriched with essential vitamins and minerals for targeted support
-Clean formulation free from unnecessary additives
-Vegan capsules suitable for daily use
-European biotech quality with full traceability and strict controls


Benefits of Hifas-Menopause

-Supports overall well-being during menopause
-Contributes to normal hormonal activity (vitamin B6)
-Helps reduce tiredness and fatigue
-Supports normal psychological function
-Helps maintain normal bones (vitamin D and zinc)
-Supports maintenance of normal mucous membranes (vitamin A)
-Contributes to daily vitality and balance


The Science Behind Hifas-Menopause

Hifas-Menopause combines adaptogenic mushrooms, plant extracts, probiotics, and essential micronutrients to provide a broad spectrum of support during hormonal transitions. Ingredients such as Reishi, Lion’s Mane, and Cordyceps are rich in naturally occurring bioactive compounds, while Ashwagandha KSM-66 and green tea extract provide additional plant-based support.

The inclusion of vitamins B6, D, A, and zinc ensures scientifically recognised contributions to hormonal regulation, immune function, bone health, and psychological well-being—making this a well-rounded, evidence-based formula.


Support your well-being through every stage with Hifas-Menopause—a natural, comprehensive formula designed for balance, vitality, and everyday support.

product.description:
DAO Enzyme (formerly Histamine Digest™) - you may receive the old packaging, no change in formulation.

Histamine Digest contains a patented enzyme formula featuring diamine oxidase (DAO). 

Normally, an enzyme in your gut breaks down histamine from your diet. This enzyme is called Diamine Oxidase or DAO. Some people, due to genetics or other factors, do not produce enough DAO enzymes. As a result, they may experience uncomfortable symptoms when eating high-histamine foods.

product.title: Electrolytes Strawberry Cherry - 250g | NoordCode
product.description: Electrolytes Strawberry Cherry is a tasty, functional electrolyte mix with sodium from unrefined sea salt, potassium and magnesium from sea minerals. European alternative to LMNT. The fresh strawberry cherry flavour comes from natural flavors and is sweetened with stevia. The composition of NoordCode Electrolytes is 1000 mg sodium400 mg potassium (20% RI)76 mg magnesium (20% RI)NoordCode has based this optimal electrolytes ratio on the following factors. Sodium: potassium The body uses sodium and potassium together to maintain the amount of water inside and outside cells. There is no absolute "perfect" ratio of sodium to potassium that applies to everyone, but there are general guidelines recommended by health organizations. According to most guidelines, the ideal ratio of sodium to potassium is somewhere between 1:1 and 1:2. For every gram of sodium, you should get about 1-2 grams of potassium. NoordCode opts for a ratio of sodium: potassium of 5:2. This assumes you also get potassium through food, such as fruit, potatoes, meat, avocado and leafy vegetables. So your total sodium: and potassium intake will still end up around a 1:2 ratio.MagnesiumThe 76 mg of magnesium comes from Aquamin™ Mg, magnesium hydroxide from seawater.

product.description: Support thyroid function, help reduce fatigue, and improve your general wellbeing with the T-Synergy Topical Patch. The thyroid is one of the most important glands in your body and controls everything from metabolism to mood. But you need the right nutrients to ensure your thyroid can work well and produce the hormones that keep you feeling your best. That’s where the T-Synergy patch comes in! This expert formulation contains iodine and copper, both essential minerals in the production of thyroid hormones. Your body can’t make iodine or copper, so lots of us need to top up. You’ll also find selenium, a powerful antioxidant that protects the thyroid from free radicals, and L-Tyrosine, which can help boost your thyroid hormone levels if they’re starting to dip. Already feeling tired? This vitamin patch also provides your optimum daily dose of vitamin B12 for an instant energy and focus boost. Alongside herbs like ginseng and ashwagandha, renowned for enhancing concentration and their rejuvenation properties. Plus, vitamin A, which can help to regulate thyroid hormones. Everything you need to thrive and feel energised again.

Magnesium is an essential mineral for optimum brain and nervous system function. If you’re deficient, you might feel low and sluggish, have trouble sleeping, and regularly experience pins and needles, and muscle cramps. Taking this powerful magnesium complex could help relieve these symptoms. As well as improving cognitive function, and supporting healthy blood pressure, and blood sugar levels. product.title: Mag Six - 60 Capsules | NoordCode
product.description: NoordCode Mag Six contains 6 types of magnesium with vitamin B6. High bioavailability of magnesium, supported by vitamin B6. For energy, muscles and mental performance. 6 bioavailable forms of magnesium. 100 mg magnesium per capsule (26% RI) Magnesium forms in supplements can differ greatly from one another. Non-organic forms of magnesium are less water-soluble and therefore less bioavailable. The widely used and inexpensive magnesium oxide, for example, is also used as a laxative or filler, not just as a magnesium supplement. Organic compounds (with amino acids) are absorbed best because of their good water solubility. These are therefore the better forms of magnesium in supplements. NoordCode Mag Six contains six forms of magnesium, each with its own benefits. All forms were selected for their good bioavailability and interesting properties. Magnesium citrate: highly absorbable form widely used in supplements. Magnesium malate: effective for energy support. Magnesium taurate: provides additional benefits of the amino acid taurate. Magnesium bisglycinate: absorbed differently from other forms of magnesium. Magnesium glycerophosphate: highly absorbable magnesium. Magnesium hydroxide: natural magnesium compound from seawater with trace minerals. Synergy of magnesium and vitamin B6 Magnesium and vitamin B6 work together in many ways. They both support among others energy levels, nerve cells and muscles. Vitamin B6 also supports the absorption of magnesium from food, so it makes sense to combine them in supplements. Benefits of magnesium and vitamin B6 Energy Magnesium and vitamin B6 support your energy levels. Magnesium and vitamin B6 contribute to extra energy when tired and fatigued. Vitamin B6 contributes to a good energy supply in the muscles. Nervous system and mental performance Magnesium and vitamin B6 support the normal functioning of the nervous system. Magnesium plays a role in the transmission of impulses between (nerve) cells. Magnesium and vitamin B6 contribute to normal mental performance, such as memory, concentration and learning ability. Muscles, bones and teeth Magnesium is important for normal muscle function. Magnesium contributes to the maintenance of strong bones & teeth. Magnesium contributes to a good electrolyte balance. Growth Magnesium plays a role in (the process of) tissue growth and development. Magnesium plays a role in building body protein. Vitamin B6 contributes to a normal protein and glycogen metabolism. Immune system and blood cells Vitamin B6 contributes to normal functioning of the immune system. Vitamin B6 contributes to the production of immune cells. Vitamin B6 contributes to the formation of red blood cells.

product.title: Everyday Essentials - 60 Capsules | NoordCode
product.description: Everyday Essentials provides 45 researched vitamins, minerals, herbs, amino acids, and other useful substances in the right amounts. Active and available forms for methylation support. NoordCode Everyday Essentials belongs to the top quality multivitamins. Here's why: Active and well absorbable forms You want to supplement your vitamins and minerals because of their functions in your body. Your body must first absorb the nutrient and then put them to work. The form of the nutrient is decisive in this respect. It is better to take enough of the active forms than to take too much of substances that do almost nothing for you. Everyday Essentials contains the most active and bioavailable forms of vitamins and minerals. These nutrients are best absorbed and do their job immediately. Personal variation can make some vitamin forms not equally effective for everyone. In such cases, we choose the active form that works for everyone. Folate (B11) is found as methyltetrahydrofolate and B12 as methylcobalamin. Meaningful doses of vitamins, minerals and other ingredients The doses of nutrients have been chosen on the basis of modern dietary patterns and scientific research. This way, you supplement the vitamins and minerals that we eat less of nowadays. For certain nutrients, a higher dose is also extra beneficial according to research. The effective dosage of the other ingredients has been chosen on the basis of scientific research. Enhanced with herbs, amino acids and other useful extras Everyday Essentials contains a large number of ingredients that, according to scientific research, are of interest to our health. Vitamins and minerals are not the only substances that benefit the body. Herbs, amino acids, polyphenols and other substances also make their contribution. Think of resveratrol, curcuma, PQQ and CoQ10, among others. The formulas of NoordCode are compatible with each other: you can use all NoordCode supplements together.

product.title: Organic Power Cacao - 300g | NoordCode
product.description: NoordCode Power Cocoa combines polyphenol-rich, raw organic Criollo cocoa with powerful mushroom extracts from KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms. Maca, Ceylon cinnamon, vanilla and inulin round out the formula for a functional and tasty cocoa powder. Delicious as a cocoa drink and excellent as an addition to (sweet) dishes. Criollo cocoa is known for its unique, rich flavour which is held as the highest standard of quality. Only 5% of the world's cocoa comes from Criollo cocoa trees. Its production and processing is completely focused on maintaining its outstanding flavour. This unique product is therefore hugely popular among cocoa lovers. Bean to bar production NoordCode uses cocoa powder made according to the bean to bar concept. Bean to bar means that the chocolate producer controls all processing steps from the cocoa (bean) to the chocolate bar. The producer has a direct relationship with cocoa farmers and pays a fair price for cocoa. This allows farmers to focus on producing superior cocoa sustainably. The cocoa powder in Power Cacao comes from Peru. NoordCode opts for maximum polyphenol retention and minimising the risk of mould growth when processing. Concentrated mushroom extracts from KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms is a Finnish producer of potent mushroom extracts. They use the fruiting bodies of organically grown or wild-picked mushrooms, where most of the useful substances can be found. Ultrasonic Assisted Extraction (UAE) gently breaks open the mushroom cells to extract as many useful substances from the mushrooms as possible. The extract of water and alcohol is then sprayed into powder containing the useful mushroom substances. KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms' powder extracts are a perfect addition to NoordCode Power Cocoa in terms of function and flavour. 225 mg Lion's Mane extract Lion's Mane (Hericium erinaceus) gets its name from the floppy spines reminiscent of a lion's mane. Lion's Mane is found in Europe, North America and Asia and is traditionally used in China. KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms grows Lion's Mane itself on birch logs organically. Each serving of Power Cacao contains 225 mg of Lion's Mane extract. 135 mg Chaga extract Chaga (Inonotus obliquus) is found in the northern regions of Europe and Asia and has been traditionally used there for centuries. The fungus grows mainly in birch trees and has a characteristic cracked, blackened appearance with a red-orange core. KÄÄPÄ Mushrooms makes their extract with wild-harvested chaga from Lapland, in northern Finland. Due to the cold winters and unpolluted nature, you can find the best quality and most effective chaga in Lapland. Each serving of Power Cacao contains 135 mg of Chaga extract.

product.title: Complete Collagen Unflavored - 450g | NoordCode
product.description: NoordCode Complete Collagen slightly sweet-sour flavour from the acerola and glycine contains 5 types of collagen from 3 sources of collagen hydrolysate. Collagen from grass-fed bovine, fish and eggshell. With vitamin C to support collagen production. With extra glycine for 7 g per serving. Type I collagen is the most abundant collagen in the body, found mainly in skin, hair, nails, bones and ligaments. Type II collagen is mainly found in cartilage between joints. Type III collagen is common along with type I in skin and blood vessels. Type V collagen is found in the skin and placenta and co-occurs with type I. Type X collagen is part of the bone and cartilage structure. Collagen from the skin of grass-fed cattle The basis of NoordCode Complete Collagen is grass-fed bovine collagen hydrolysate. This collagen hydrolysate is also available separately as NoordCode Pure Collagen. The collagen is derived from the skin, bones, tendons and joints of grass-fed, European cattle. Naticol® Collagen and type II collagen from fish Fish has a different amino acid profile to bovine collagen, making it a good addition to your collagen intake. Naticol® is a pure collagen hydrolysate made from fish skins left over after filleting. The fish skins come from sustainable, wild-caught fish and farmed fish, in order to use as many different sources as possible. Naticol thus takes a 'waste product' and turns it into a high-quality collagen hydrolysate. It is readily soluble in liquids. Ovomet® collagen from eggshell membranes The eggshell membrane is the thin membrane directly under the eggshell. This membrane contains not only collagen, but also elastin, hyaluronic acid, glucosamine and chondroitin. These substances are also common in our skin. Eggshell membrane is therefore a nice way to get these substances. Ovomet® hydrolysed eggshell membrane is readily bioavailable, just like the bovine and fish collagen in NoordCode Complete Collagen. Enzymatically produced collagen hydrolysate NoordCode uses enzymatically produced collagen hydrolysate. This requires no heating or chemicals that could damage the protein. 125 g Vitamin C from Acerola berries The body uses vitamin C in the production of collagen. NoordCode Complete Collagen therefore contains 125 mg of vitamin C from acerola berries per serving (15 g). Acerola berries are a natural source of vitamin C. Vitamin C supports normal collagen formation for the normal function of skin, blood vessels, bones & cartilage, teeth & gums. Vitamin C contributes to maintain the normal function of the immune system during and after intense physical exercise Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of blood vessels, bones, cartilage, skin, teeth & gums Vitamin C contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism Vitamin C contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system Vitamin C contributes to normal psychological function Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system Vitamin C contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue Vitamin C contributes to the regeneration of the reduced form of vitamin E Vitamin C increases iron absorption

product.title: Liposomal Methyl B12 - 30ml | Quicksilver Scientific

Oudere volwassenen en mensen met een verminderde zuurgraad in de maag (vooral als ze protonpompremmers of maagzuurremmers gebruiken) hebben een beperkte opname van vitamine B12 en zouden suppletie moeten overwegen. Vitamine B12 supplementen worden niet zo goed opgenomen in de darmen, maar deze formule met liposomale afgifte wordt beter opgenomen door het lichaam. Het vloeibare formaat begint te werken zodra het in de mond komt. Deze afgiftetechnologie werkt zeer snel.

Olijfblad (Olea europaea) wordt al duizenden jaren of langer als therapeutisch middel gebruikt, maar is pas de laatste 25 jaar populair geworden op de Amerikaanse markt. Het meeste in de handel verkrijgbare olijfblad is in extractvorm. Omdat we zoveel mogelijk gericht zijn op het gebruik van hele, natuurlijke kruiden, proberen we producten te vinden in een hele, gedroogde vorm (in tegenstelling tot een extract). Door dit te doen, behoudt het kruid alle componenten in dezelfde verhouding als in de natuur (zo dicht mogelijk gezien het feit dat het gedroogd is). Extractie, standaardisatie etc. worden vaak gebruikt om één component van het product te maximaliseren, maar vaak werken alle componenten synergetisch samen.

product.title: N-Acetyl-Cysteine (NAC) 600mg - 100 Capsules | Protocol for Life Balance
product.description: N-Acetyl-Cysteïne (NAC) is samengesteld om de cellulaire gezondheid te ondersteunen, met een dosis van 600 mg NAC per capsule, naast de sporenmineralen selenium en molybdeen. NAC is een betrouwbare vorm van het niet-essentiële aminozuur cysteïne. NAC bezit niet alleen zijn eigen vrije radicalen neutraliserende activiteit, maar het speelt ook een cruciale rol in de bevoorrading van het lichaam met cysteïne. Dit maakt de productie en aanvulling mogelijk van glutathion, de belangrijkste antioxidant in ons lichaam, en biedt bescherming tegen schadelijke vrije radicalen. Deze formule onderscheidt zich door de toevoeging van twee sporenmineralen: molybdeen, een essentiële cofactor voor talloze biochemische reacties, en selenium, dat bekend staat om zijn vermogen om de productie van glutathion te ondersteunen. *Disclaimer: Onze supplementen worden vertrouwd en geselecteerd door artsen. Wetgeving beperkt de informatie die we kunnen delen. Raadpleeg voor volledige informatie een medische bibliotheek. Vertaald met DeepL.com (gratis versie)

product.title: Immune Defense Plus (Topical Patch 30 Day Supply) - 30 Patches | PatchMD
product.description: Maak kennis met de Immunity Patch PatchMD is het originele patchmerk dat gespecialiseerd is in innovatieve wellnessoplossingen, waarbij onze Immunity Patch een opvallend product is. Deze vitaminepatch is vakkundig gemaakt om het immuunsysteem te ondersteunen, met een mix van hoogwaardige ingrediënten die bekend staan om hun belangrijke rol bij het behouden van de gezondheid. De belangrijkste ingrediënten in deze pleister zijn vitamine C (ascorbinezuur) en vitamine D3, beide essentieel voor een normale werking van het immuunsysteem. Vitamine C is cruciaal voor de aanmaak van witte bloedcellen, die infecties bestrijden, terwijl Vitamine D3 een rol speelt in het proces van celdeling. Daarnaast bevat de pleister Zinkcitraat, dat bijdraagt aan een normale DNA-synthese, en een reeks volledig natuurlijke ingrediënten zoals Zwarte vlierbessenextract, Oregano-olie en Ginkgo Biloba, die bekend staan om hun kruidenremediërende eigenschappen. Waarom deze pleisters zo goed werken De pleister is ontworpen voor gebruiksgemak en wordt aangebracht op een relatief haarvrij deel van het menselijk lichaam, zoals de binnenkant van de pols. Dit zorgt voor een optimale opname van de dagelijkse dosis voedingsstoffen gedurende 24 uur. Omdat het glutenvrij is en geen kunstmatige kleurstoffen bevat, is het een uitstekende keuze voor mensen die op zoek zijn naar een natuurlijke benadering van wellness. PatchMD biedt dit geweldige product aan met het gemak van een abonnementsdienst. Door te kiezen voor abonneren en besparen kunnen klanten hun favoriete artikelen, zoals de Immunity Plus Patch, automatisch geleverd krijgen tegen een totaalprijs die de besparingen weerspiegelt. Het abonnement kan op elk moment worden opgewaardeerd, zodat klanten altijd hun welzijnspatches bij de hand hebben. De Immunity Defense Patch is een nieuwe patch op de markt, die 5 sterren verdient voor zijn effectiviteit en kwaliteit. Met gratis verzending bij de eerste bestelling maakt PatchMD het gemakkelijk om deze patches in je dagelijkse routine op te nemen en gezond te blijven. Topical Immunity Defense is meer dan alleen een voedingssupplement; het is een toewijding aan je welzijn, rechtstreeks aan huis geleverd. Product Beschrijving Vitamine D & Zink spelen een rol in het proces van celdeling Vitamine C & Zink dragen bij aan de bescherming van cellen tegen oxidatieve stress Vitamine C draagt bij aan het behoud van de normale werking van het immuunsysteem tijdens en na intensieve lichamelijke inspanning Zink, Vitamine C & D dragen bij tot de normale werking van het immuunsysteem Ons lichaam en in het bijzonder ons immuunsysteem heeft nog nooit zoveel onder stress gestaan als nu. Met een verhoogde toxische belasting en een verminderde nutriëntendichtheid in onze voeding, heeft ons immuunsysteem minder ondersteuning voor een optimale werking. Immune Defense Plus is het eerste en enige supplement dat immuunondersteuning voor de lever en antioxidantondersteuning combineert in één pleister. Deze unieke combinatie van immuunverdedigende kruiden, paddenstoelenextracten en antioxidanten ondersteunt het lichaam. PatchMD gebruikt de meest hoogwaardige, biologisch beschikbare vormen van voedingsstoffen zonder kunstmatige ingrediënten of vulstoffen. Patches bieden de unieke voordelen van: Gemakkelijk te gebruiken topische patches Geen pillen slikken Meer informatie over dit product Vanwege de wetgeving omtrent supplementen mogen wij helaas geen (volledige) informatie geven over dit product. product.title: D3K2 - 50ml | Quicksilver Scientific
product.description: Nanoemulge D3K2 van Quicksilver Scientific biedt een goed opneembare, liposomale vorm van vitamine D en K. In hun meest actieve vorm als D3 en K2 werken ze samen in het lichaam om de gezondheid en sterkte van onze botten te ondersteunen. Vitamine D is vooral belangrijk voor een gezond immuunsysteem, maar een tekort komt vaak voor, vooral bij mensen met een donkere huid, beperkte blootstelling aan de zon of een slechte algemene gezondheid.- Levert 2500 IE vitamine D, in zijn actieve vorm als D3- Vitamine D ondersteunt een gezond immuunsysteem- Vitamine K draagt bij aan een normale bloedstolling- Vitamine K & D dragen bij tot de instandhouding van normale botten- Vitamine D draagt bij tot een normaal calciumgehalte in het bloed- Vitamine D draagt bij tot een normale opname/gebruik van calcium en fosfor- Vitamine D speelt een rol in het proces van celdeling- Vitamine D draagt bij tot de instandhouding van een normale spierfunctieVitamine D en K kunnen gunstig zijn wanneer ze samen worden ingenomen, omdat ze in het lichaam samenwerken om de gezondheid van de botten te ondersteunen. Nanoemulge D3K2 levert deze vitamines in hun meest heilzame vorm als K2 en D3. Zorgen voor optimale vitamine D-niveaus is belangrijk voor de gezondheid. Het is een belangrijke vitamine voor een gezond immuunsysteem en kan helpen ontstekingsniveaus te verlagen. Het is ook nodig voor veel andere functies in het lichaam en is goed voor de gezondheid van de hersenen en de geestelijke gezondheid. De beste bron van vitamine D is blootstelling aan zonlicht, alleen tijdens de warmere maanden. Het komt in kleine hoeveelheden voor in heel weinig voedingsmiddelen. Daarom kan een supplement voor velen nuttig zijn.
